# Notes

Operations related to notes. Notes are contextual comments across various entities including orders, listings, customers, and appointments.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PUT` | `/orders/{order_id}/notes` | Update order notes. | Bearer token required |

## `PUT /orders/{order_id}/notes`

Update order notes.

Update order notes.

- Operation ID: `orders-order-id-notes-put`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `OrderNotesPutPayload`, `OrderResource`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `order_id` | `path` | Yes | string (uuid) | The ID of an order. UUID Version 4. |

### Request Body

- Required: No
- `application/json`: `OrderNotesPutPayload`

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | OrderResource | `application/json`: `OrderResource` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |
